result: The data has been processed according to the metadata and requirements. The earliest age of alcohol consumption (`alcfst`) was derived by checking the 'ever had a drink' variables across waves (Age 14, 15, 16, 17, 19, 20, 21, and 32) and assigning the age of the first wave where a positive response was recorded. The final output containing `NSID` and `alcfst` has been saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
